channel.title: 水水獭的QQ空间
channel.description: Recent content on 水水獭的QQ空间

item.title: Zero Knowledge Proofs:An illustrated primer
item.description: 原文链接：Zero Knowledge Proofs: An illustrated primer One of the best things about modern cryptography （密码学） is the beautiful terminology （术语）. You could start any number of punk bands (or Tumblrs) named after cryptography terms like ‘hard-core predicate

item.title: Java并发编程的艺术笔记
item.description: 第2章 Java并发机制的底层实现原理 2.1 volatile的应用 volatile的两条实现原则： Lock前缀指令会引起处理器缓存回写到内存。 一个

item.title: 欧拉方法、隐式欧拉方法
item.description:
求解如下常微分方程：
$$ \begin{aligned} \begin{cases} \frac{du}{dt}=-\frac{u}{t},1\leq t\leq 2, \\ u(1)=1 \end{cases} \end{aligned} $$

item.title: 如何用git同步本地代码到github
item.description: 步骤 1.在本地建立一个文件夹，并定位到该文件夹下 2.输入命令git init git config --global user.name "wenjin1997" git config --global user.email "wenjin1997@126.com" 3.配置SSHssh-keygen -t rsa -C "xxxxxxxx@163.com" (登录gi

About Me Huabing Zhao is a software architect, an Istio Member and an ONAP PTL. He has a solid experience in the information and telecommunication technology industry for more than 17 years. Throughout his career, he has built a number of large-scale, cross-country software systems, most of them are still running in production. He loves open source and has been contributing to various open source projects, he is a member
